title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!
